questions.question: Explain the difference between a network layer and a data link layer in the OSI model. Provide one example of a protocol that operates at each layer.
questions.hint: Use the OSI model diagram to support your answer

questions.question: What is the main function of the Internet Protocol (IP) in the internet layer of the OSI model? Describe how IP addresses are used to route packets of data across the internet.
questions.hint: Use the IP addressing rules to support your answer

questions.question: Compare and contrast the features of a Local Area Network (LAN) and a Wide Area Network (WAN). Include a diagram to illustrate the difference in connectivity.
questions.hint: Use a diagram to support your answer
